title: Enhanced creepers
description: Makes creepers better and adds new creepers.
body:
# What does this pack do?

This pack adds new creepers and makes the creeper improved. These are the creepers,

![Creeper](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0fc6c9cf9730c77bd3c531e93b6b4853503af9e4.png)

![Desert creeper](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0bccbeb6137d3e269325d7ffd0ec13e806b9ef4f.png)

![Winter creeper](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1c3454cc7f42d40e20a80252926543613f252b8d.png)

![Pale garden creeper](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/080f3361e6f7140bacc93e799bca6a4f61f26d07.png)

![Swamp creeper](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/057668bf5c9a89f10eac735020ee1bb4a19b674a.png)

And many more!

# **Installation Guide:**

**Windows:**
1. Go to your files to %appdata% and then go to the /.minecraft/ folder.
2. Go to /.minecraft/resourcepacks.
3. Put the resourcepack in the folder.

**Linux:**

1. Go to your files to your /.minecraft/ folder.
2. Then go to /resourcepacks/.
3. Put the resourcepack in the same folder.

**MacOS**

1. Go to ~/.minecraft/resourcepacks/ in your file manager.
2. Put the pack inside that folder.


#
